tasks.label: Reproduce multi-model benchmark folders
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --model github_copilot/gpt-4.1 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe

tasks.label: Validate purge then benchmark
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --purge && uv run benchmark --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --model github_copilot/gpt-4.1 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe

tasks.label: Inspect purge candidates
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; import re; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); rx=re.compile(r'^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}--'); print(sorted((p.name, p.is_dir(), bool(rx.match(p.name))) for p in root.iterdir()))"

tasks.label: Python list benchmark root
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; print([p.name for p in Path('tmp.benchmarks').iterdir()])"

tasks.label: List benchmark root before repro
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print(sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir()) if root.exists() else [])"

tasks.label: Repro extra benchmark folder from empty root
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --model github_copilot/gpt-4.1 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe

tasks.label: Python list benchmark root after repro
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print('all=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir())); print('dirs=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir())); print('files=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_file()))"

tasks.label: Show benchmark dir mtimes
Show benchmark root resolution
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; import os; from aider_polyglot_benchmark.benchmark import BENCHMARK_DNAME; p=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print('cwd=', Path.cwd()); print('rel=', p.resolve()); print('benchmark_dname=', BENCHMARK_DNAME.resolve()); print('env=', os.environ.get('AIDER_BENCHMARK_DIR'))"

tasks.label: Run two-model benchmark once
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --model github_copilot/gpt-4.1 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe

tasks.label: Inspect benchmark root after one run
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print('all=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir())); print('dirs=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir())); print('files=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_file()))"

tasks.label: Fresh python list benchmark root
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; print(sorted(p.name for p in Path('tmp.benchmarks').iterdir()))"

tasks.label: Validate staged purge end-to-end
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --purge && uv run benchmark --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --model github_copilot/gpt-4.1 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print(sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir()))"

tasks.label: Repro single-model named benchmark
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --purge && uv run benchmark ssssssssssss --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print('all=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir())); print('dirs=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir())); print('files=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_file()))"

tasks.label: Inspect purge internals
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; from aider_polyglot_benchmark.benchmark import BENCHMARK_DNAME, cleanup_benchmark_artifacts, is_benchmark_result_dir; print('root=', BENCHMARK_DNAME); print('exists=', BENCHMARK_DNAME.exists()); print('before=', [(p.name, p.is_dir(), is_benchmark_result_dir(p)) for p in BENCHMARK_DNAME.iterdir()]); summary=cleanup_benchmark_artifacts(); print('removed=', [p.name for p in summary.removed_dirs]); print('skipped=', [p.name for p in summary.skipped_dirs]); print('after=', [p.name for p in BENCHMARK_DNAME.iterdir()])"

tasks.label: Validate single-model one-folder workflow
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --purge && uv run benchmark ssssssssssss --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); dirs=sorted(p for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir()); print('dirs=', [p.name for p in dirs]); target=dirs[0]; practices=sorted((target / 'csharp' / 'exercises' / 'practice').iterdir()); print('practice_count=', len(practices)); print('practice_names=', [p.name for p in practices])"

tasks.label: Revalidate named single-model workflow
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --purge && uv run benchmark ssssssssssss --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); dirs=sorted(p for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir()); files=sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_file()); print('dirs=', [p.name for p in dirs]); print('files=', files); target=dirs[0]; practices=sorted((target / 'csharp' / 'exercises' / 'practice').iterdir()); print('practice_count=', len(practices)); print('practice_names=', [p.name for p in practices])"

tasks.label: Verify named run reuse behavior
tasks.command: uv run benchmark ssssssssssss --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe --no-aider --no-unit-tests && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print('dirs=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir()))"

tasks.label: Verify latest named run reuse
tasks.command: uv run benchmark ssssssssssss --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe --no-aider --no-unit-tests && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print('dirs=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir()))"

tasks.label: Validate named run reset behavior
tasks.command: uv run benchmark ssssssssssss --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe --no-aider --no-unit-tests && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); dirs=sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir()); print('dirs=', dirs)"

tasks.label: Final verify one named benchmark dir
tasks.command: uv run benchmark ssssssssssss --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe --no-aider --no-unit-tests && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print('dirs=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir())); print('files=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_file()))"

tasks.label: Validate named single-model three cases
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --purge && uv run benchmark ssssssssssss --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 3 --unsafe && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); dirs=sorted(p for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir()); files=sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_file()); print('dirs=', [p.name for p in dirs]); print('files=', files); target=dirs[0]; practices=sorted((target / 'csharp' / 'exercises' / 'practice').iterdir()); print('practice_count=', len(practices)); print('practice_names=', [p.name for p in practices])"

tasks.label: Validate unnamed single-model three cases
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 3 --unsafe && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); dirs=sorted(p for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir()); files=sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_file()); print('dirs=', [p.name for p in dirs]); print('files=', files); target=dirs[-1]; practices=sorted((target / 'csharp' / 'exercises' / 'practice').iterdir()); print('picked_dir=', target.name); print('practice_count=', len(practices)); print('practice_names=', [p.name for p in practices])"

tasks.label: Purge and inspect benchmark root
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --purge && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print('exists=', root.exists()); print('all=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir()) if root.exists() else [])"

tasks.label: Trace leftover purge dir
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; from aider_polyglot_benchmark.benchmark import cleanup_benchmark_artifacts, BENCHMARK_DNAME, is_benchmark_result_dir; root=BENCHMARK_DNAME; print('before=', [(p.name, p.is_dir(), is_benchmark_result_dir(p)) for p in root.iterdir()]); summary=cleanup_benchmark_artifacts(); print('removed=', [p.name for p in summary.removed_dirs]); print('skipped=', [p.name for p in summary.skipped_dirs]); print('after=', [p.name for p in root.iterdir()])"

tasks.label: Re-run from empty benchmark root
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 3 --unsafe && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print('all=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir())); print('dirs=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir())); print('files=', sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_file())); target=sorted((p for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir()), key=lambda p: p.name)[-1]; practices=sorted((target / 'csharp' / 'exercises' / 'practice').iterdir()); print('target=', target.name); print('practice_count=', len(practices)); print('practice_names=', [p.name for p in practices])"

tasks.label: Validate hard purge CLI
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --hard-purge && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print(sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir()) if root.exists() else [])"

tasks.label: Trace hard purge leftover
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; from aider_polyglot_benchmark.benchmark import hard_cleanup_benchmark_artifacts, BENCHMARK_DNAME, is_benchmark_result_dir; root=BENCHMARK_DNAME; print('before=', [(p.name, p.is_dir(), is_benchmark_result_dir(p)) for p in root.iterdir()]); summary=hard_cleanup_benchmark_artifacts(); print('removed=', [p.name for p in summary.removed_dirs]); print('skipped=', [p.name for p in summary.skipped_dirs]); print('killed=', summary.killed_processes); print('failed=', summary.failed_processes); print('after=', [p.name for p in root.iterdir()])"

tasks.label: Diagnose purge failure path
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; from aider_polyglot_benchmark.benchmark import BENCHMARK_DNAME, stage_dir_for_cleanup_with_retries, remove_tree_with_retries; root=BENCHMARK_DNAME; target=next(p for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir()); print('target=', target); staged=stage_dir_for_cleanup_with_retries(target, root, attempts=1, delay_seconds=0.0); print('staged=', staged); actual=staged or target; print('exists_before_remove=', actual.exists()); print('remove_ok=', remove_tree_with_retries(actual, attempts=1, delay_seconds=0.0)); print('exists_after_remove=', actual.exists()); print('root_after=', [p.name for p in root.iterdir()])"

tasks.label: Revalidate hard purge CLI
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe --no-aider --no-unit-tests && uv run benchmark --hard-purge && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print(sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir()) if root.exists() else [])"

tasks.label: Final hard purge validation
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --model github_copilot/gpt-4 --languages csharp --num-tests 1 --unsafe --no-aider --no-unit-tests && uv run benchmark --hard-purge && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print(sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir()) if root.exists() else [])"

tasks.label: List after hard purge direct
tasks.command: uv run benchmark --hard-purge && uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; root=Path('tmp.benchmarks'); print(sorted(p.name for p in root.iterdir()) if root.exists() else [])"

tasks.label: Run auto report mode integration test
Revalidate parallel report mode integration tests
Validate quiet output and worker tree labels
Check uv TTY status
args: import sys; print('stdout', sys.stdout.isatty()); print('stderr', sys.stderr.isatty())

tasks.label: Check Rich interactive flags
args: from rich.console import Console; c=Console(stderr=True, highlight=False); print(c.is_terminal); print(c.is_dumb_terminal); print(c.is_interactive)

tasks.label: Validate benchmark help default edit format
Revalidate benchmark help default edit format
